text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm enjoying a relaxing walk through<n>a park
when I come across Curren<n>Chan feeding ducks
at a pond.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
There you go. Eat up now, my cute<n>little duckies!
♪ You need to show<n>everyone on Umastagram
just how<n>cute you are!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Oh. Is that who I think it is?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hiii, Brian! ♪ Want to feed the duckies<n>with me?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Duck feeding? I'm good. I'm just<n>passing
through.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah? But you kinda look like<n>you've got time
on your hands...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That's not really any of your<n>business...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Come on! You might find that you like<n>it if you
give it a try. I even have<n>permission from the
groundskeeper to<n>do this all day! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Come on, Brian! Join in! It'll be fuuun!<n>♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh, fine. If it'll shut you up.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Eat up already! It's food!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
What the hell? It's like they're<n>specifically
avoiding my food.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, you can't make a face<n>like that.
You're scaring the poor little<n>duckies.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch, why do I have to worry about<n>that? I'm the
one feeding them.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but the duckies probably think<n>you're up to
no good. You have to let<n>them know you just
wanna be<n>friends.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I've got some yummy food over<n>here! Dig in,
everyone! ♪ Nom nom<n>nom nom! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ducks
text_block_list.text: Quack, quack!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: See, just like that! ♪ Now you try! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Like hell I will!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps frightened by Narita Brian's<n>angry
outburst, the ducks begin to<n>take flight...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Stop right there!

text_block_list.name: Ducks
text_block_list.text: Quack?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Okay, you little brats... Do you really<n>got the guts
to not only ignore me, but<n>to fly off without
eating?

text_block_list.name: Ducks
text_block_list.text: Q-quack...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Get back here and line up... That's<n>right, one at a
time. Now take your<n>food.
choice_data_list: (I wonder if that's a bit too intimidating...)
(I wonder if that's a bit too intimidating...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Get back here and line up... That's<n>right, one at a
time. Now take your<n>food.
choice_data_list: (I wonder if that's a bit too intimidating...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, piece of cake. I should've<n>done this from
the start.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Holy quackamole! Look how nicely<n>they're lined
up! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oooh! ♪ I've just got to uploadthis to Umastagram! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, Narita Brian manages to feed<n>the ducks
in her own unique way.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
For crying out loud... Do I really have<n>to get this
ticked off before you lot will<n>eat?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm... Something about them feels off,<n>though.

text_block_list.name: Ducks
text_block_list.text: Q-quack...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While the ducks are taking the food,<n>they seem
to be literally too frightened<n>to swallow it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Brian! You need to turn down the<n>intensity a
notch or two!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: A-are you kidding me? Stupid ducks...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... Looks like that was the<n>easiest way to
do it after all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, they ate everything. Sheesh,<n>bunch of
pains in my—

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Brian! Behind you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I turn to find the flock of ducks has<n>smartly
submitted to Narita Brian and<n>is now following
their new alpha hen.

text_block_list.name: Ducks
text_block_list.text: Quack!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Scram!
